heading: Immunity from attachment and execution of property of a foreign state
label: 1609 Immunity from attachment and execution of property of a foreign state
text: Subject to existing international agreements to which the United States is a party at the time of enactment of this Act the property in the United States of a foreign state shall be immune from attachment arrest and execution except as provided in sections 1610 and 1611 of this chapter.11So in original. Probably should be followed by a comma.1
notes: References in TextThe time of enactment of this Act, referred to in text, probably means the time of enactment of , which was approved .Pub. L. 94–583Oct. 21, 1976
Effective DateSection effective 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 21, 1976section 8 of Pub. L. 94–583section 1602 of this title
